summary: Iteration 13 Testing Complete - BIQC Admin Access Control Verified. All 12 backend tests passed. ProtectedRoute.js correctly enforces adminOnly prop by checking user role from backend via GET /api/auth/supabase/me. Non-admin users will see AccessDenied screen. Unauthenticated users are redirected to login.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js line 71 - Component accepts {children, adminOnly} props
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js lines 102-122 - useEffect checks admin role via /api/auth/supabase/me when adminOnly=true
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js line 108 - apiClient.get('/auth/supabase/me') is called
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js lines 142-148 - Returns AccessDenied component when adminOnly=true and isAdmin=false
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js line 40 - AccessDenied has data-testid='access-denied-screen'
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js line 45 - 'Return to Dashboard' link points to '/advisor'
VERIFIED: server.py lines 884-886 - get_admin_user accepts role='admin' and role='superadmin'
VERIFIED: server.py line 8464 - GET /api/admin/users uses Depends(get_admin_user)
VERIFIED: server.py line 8469 - GET /api/admin/stats uses Depends(get_admin_user)
VERIFIED: App.js line 128 - /admin route uses adminOnly prop: <ProtectedRoute adminOnly>
VERIFIED: Unauthenticated users accessing /admin are redirected to /login-supabase (lines 130-131)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin access control fully verified. ProtectedRoute adminOnly enforcement works correctly: 1) Unauthenticated users redirect to login 2) Authenticated non-admin users see AccessDenied screen 3) Backend admin endpoints return 403 for non-admin roles. Note: All 34 users in DB have role='user', so AccessDenied screen cannot be live-tested without creating an admin user. Code review confirms the logic is correct.

code_structure_notes.admin_check_flow: ProtectedRoute checks adminOnly → calls /api/auth/supabase/me → extracts role → checks ADMIN_ROLES.includes(role) → returns AccessDenied or children
code_structure_notes.backend_protection: All /api/admin/* endpoints use Depends(get_admin_user) which raises 403 if role not in ('admin', 'superadmin')
code_structure_notes.testing_limitation: Live testing of AccessDenied screen requires an admin user in DB (none currently exist)
